ogTitle: Tannum Sands vs Tansey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tannum Sands and Tansey.
heading: Tannum Sands vs Tansey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tannum Sands, Queensland and Tansey, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tannum Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tansey (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tannum Sands or Tansey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tannum Sands has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Tansey scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tannum Sands scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Tansey scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tannum Sands or Tansey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tannum Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
